investor_demo_clips.why: The rally features an extended dink battle that abruptly transitions into a rapid-fire net exchange, showcasing both patience and quick reflexes.
investor_demo_clips.caption: Patience pays off! 🤯 This dink battle turned into a lightning-fast volley exchange at the kitchen! Who else loves a good speedup? #pickleball #dinkbattle #volley #kitchenline #pickleballaddict
